creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Mon Feb 18 02:17:02 2013
New Revision: 312471
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/312471

Log:
  Frozen-Flask freezes a Flask application into a set of static files.
  The result can be hosted without any server-side software other than
  a traditional web server.
  
  This project used to be called Flask-Static.
  
  WWW:    http://pythonhosted.org/Frozen-Flask/
  
  PR:		ports/176220
  Submitted by:	Oleg Pudeyev <oleg@bsdpower.com>

Added:
  head/www/py-frozen-flask/
  head/www/py-frozen-flask/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/py-frozen-flask/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/py-frozen-flask/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/py-frozen-flask/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/www/Makefile

Modified: head/www/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/Makefile	Mon Feb 18 02:12:22 2013	(r312470)
+++ head/www/Makefile	Mon Feb 18 02:17:02 2013	(r312471)
@@ -1516,6 +1516,7 @@
     SUBDIR += py-flup
     SUBDIR += py-formalchemy
     SUBDIR += py-formencode
+    SUBDIR += py-frozen-flask
     SUBDIR += py-funkload
     SUBDIR += py-google-api-python-client
     SUBDIR += py-graphite-web

Added: head/www/py-frozen-flask/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/py-frozen-flask/Makefile	Mon Feb 18 02:17:02 2013	(r312471)
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+# Created by: Oleg Pudeyev <oleg@bsdpower.com>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	Frozen-Flask
+PORTVERSION=	0.9
+CATEGORIES=	www python
+MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
+
+MAINTAINER=	oleg@bsdpower.com
+COMMENT=	Freezes a Flask application into a set of static files
+
+LICENSE=	BSD
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}Flask>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-flask
+
+USE_PYTHON=	2.6+
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/www/py-frozen-flask/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/py-frozen-flask/distinfo	Mon Feb 18 02:17:02 2013	(r312471)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (Frozen-Flask-0.9.tar.gz) = 21d7a6f2fba940106544aaf41bd5f26e281d96fbb642d7876a3aaceec944a163
+SIZE (Frozen-Flask-0.9.tar.gz) = 73608

Added: head/www/py-frozen-flask/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/py-frozen-flask/pkg-descr	Mon Feb 18 02:17:02 2013	(r312471)
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+Frozen-Flask freezes a Flask application into a set of static files.
+The result can be hosted without any server-side software other than
+a traditional web server.
+
+This project used to be called Flask-Static.
+
+WWW:    http://pythonhosted.org/Frozen-Flask/

Added: head/www/py-frozen-flask/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/py-frozen-flask/pkg-plist	Mon Feb 18 02:17:02 2013	(r312471)
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/EGG-INFO/PKG-INFO
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/EGG-INFO/SOURCES.txt
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/EGG-INFO/dependency_links.txt
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/EGG-INFO/not-zip-safe
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/EGG-INFO/requires.txt
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/EGG-INFO/top_level.txt
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_frozen/__init__.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_frozen/__init__.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_frozen/__init__.pyo
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_frozen/test_app/__init__.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_frozen/test_app/__init__.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_frozen/test_app/__init__.pyo
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_frozen/test_app/admin/__init__.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_frozen/test_app/admin/__init__.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_frozen/test_app/admin/__init__.pyo
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_frozen/test_app/admin/admin_static/style.css
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_frozen/test_app/static/style.css
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_frozen/tests.py
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_frozen/tests.pyc
+%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_frozen/tests.pyo
+@dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_frozen/test_app/static
+@dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_frozen/test_app/admin/admin_static
+@dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_frozen/test_app/admin
+@dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_frozen/test_app
+@dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/flask_frozen
+@dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%/EGG-INFO
+@dirrm %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/%%PYEASYINSTALL_EGG%%
